summary: Created comprehensive VA API setup guide with step-by-step instructions for establishing reverse bridge communication from zoputer to va
learnings: VA API setup requires bidirectional bridge documentation - not just technical steps but when/why to use the bridge
Security considerations are critical - key rotation, audit trails, emergency procedures must be explicit
Troubleshooting section essential since API setup often has environment-specific issues

details.manual_step_required: V must create API key on va and add to zoputer secrets
details.verification_steps: Ping test and connection validation included
details.notes: Guide is complete and ready for V to execute. Covers both technical setup and operational usage patterns.
